x.summary:
The standard applied by DOGE was very simple and easy:

Provide contact information for the recipients of aid, so that we can confirm it is not fraudulent. 

The reality is that money was being sent to corrupt politicians under the guise of aid! Liars and stock insider traders like Ro the Robber should be in prison!!
x.author: elonmusk

x.title:
5 steps to create amazing videos like the one below from HTML for free:

Install @HyperFrames_ in your favorite coding h
x.summary:
5 steps to create amazing videos like the one below from HTML for free:

Install @HyperFrames_ in your favorite coding harness (e.g., Codex or Claude Code).

Then...

1. Gather your assets

Create a project folder and add screenshots, logos, website captures, reference clips, and a frame md to give Hyperframes the raw material for your video.

If you have a design md you can convert it to a frame md here: https://t.co/3l6bT1BA9Q

📌 Watch @JakeFromHeyGen cover all 5 steps live: https://t.co/3VYURHutAf

...or keep reading below 👇
x.author: petergyang

x.title: Programming is not about code, just like music is not about notation. It is the art & science of managing complexity
x.summary: Programming is not about code, just like music is not about notation. It is the art & science of managing complexity through layers of abstraction. AI is simply a part of it.
x.author: fchollet

blogs.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
blogs.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

videos.title: Can Robotics Hackathon Change Your Life?
videos.summary:
One year ago thousands of people worked for 48h to build something cool with LeRobot library: https://huggingface.co/lerobot

LeRobot Worldwide Hackathon was a global AI robotics challenge that took place June 14-15, 2025. Discover how one weekend of open-source building launched careers, inspired new research, and turned total beginners into robotics experts.

From folding t-shirts to Lego sorting factories, see what is possible when the community gets their hands dirty with open source AI and robotics.

🏆 See all winners from the event: https://huggingface.co/spaces/LeRobot-worldwide-hackathon/all-winners
🌍 Learn more about the hackathon: https://huggingface.co/LeRobot-worldwide-hackathon

#robotics #lerobot
videos.author: Hugging Face
